description: QuantSync UI/UX polish: Wire all components through API hooks with proper loading/error/empty states, add spring-physics animations using the already-installed framer-motion (StaggerList, PageTransition, SpringButton, AnimatePresence from @quant/shared-ui), staggered list entrances, page transitions, responsive dark-mode styles with Tailwind (360px-1440px), 44px minimum tap targets, and hover/press/focus states across all pages and components.
steps: Update apps/quantsync/src/app/layout.tsx to import MotionProvider from @quant/shared-ui and wrap the app tree. Ensure dark mode html class is managed.

Update apps/quantsync/src/app/page.tsx (Feed page): Wrap post list in StaggerList for staggered entrance animation, add PageTransition wrapper, use SpringButton for like/repost/bookmark actions, add proper skeleton loader (PostCard-shaped skeletons), add pull-to-refresh UX, ensure 44px min tap targets, responsive max-w-2xl centering with proper padding. Add empty state with friendly copy. Ensure all button elements use dark mode colors.

Update apps/quantsync/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Wrap in motion.article with FadeIn, add SpringButton for action buttons (like, repost, bookmark, share), add scale animation on like (heart burst), proper dark mode classes throughout (dark:bg-*, dark:text-*, dark:border-*, dark:hover:bg-*), 44px action button tap areas, responsive media grid, accessible focus rings.

Update apps/quantsync/src/components/FeedToggle.tsx: Add motion.div for the active tab indicator (layoutId animation for sliding underline), dark mode tab colors, 44px tab heights, responsive horizontal scroll on small screens.

Update apps/quantsync/src/components/TrendingSidebar.tsx: Add StaggerList for topic items entrance, dark mode card/text colors, responsive hide on mobile (hidden on <lg, shown on lg+), hover transitions.

Update apps/quantsync/src/components/PostComposer.tsx: Add FadeIn animation on mount, dark mode textarea/button styles, responsive full-width on mobile, 44px submit button, focus ring on textarea, character count indicator.
Update apps/quantsync/src/components/VoteButtons.tsx: Add spring animation on vote (scale bounce), dark mode colors for up/down arrows, 44px tap targets, optimistic UI update pattern.
Update apps/quantsync/src/components/CommentThread.tsx: Add staggered entrance for nested comments, dark mode text/border, indentation responsive to screen width, 44px vote/reply buttons.
Update apps/quantsync/src/components/CommunityCard.tsx: Add ScaleOnHover, dark mode card styling, responsive card width, 44px join button.
Update apps/quantsync/src/components/SpaceRoom.tsx: Add animated participant indicators, dark mode styling, responsive layout.
Update apps/quantsync/src/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx: Add FadeIn animation, dark mode chart colors, responsive container.
Update apps/quantsync/src/components/PollCreator.tsx: Add dark mode form styling, 44px buttons, responsive width.
Ensure all legacy pages (src/legacy-pages/*.tsx) that are still referenced have at minimum: proper loading/error/empty states, dark mode classes, responsive layout, and PageTransition wrappers.
acceptance_criteria: MotionProvider wraps the app in layout.tsx
Feed page uses StaggerList for post list entrance animation
All interactive buttons have min-h-[44px] or equivalent tap targets
PostCard has full dark mode support with proper contrast
FeedToggle has animated sliding indicator for active tab
All components have dark: variant Tailwind classes
Responsive: pages render properly from 360px to 1440px
Loading states show skeleton loaders shaped like content
Error states use ErrorState component with retry
Empty states have friendly descriptive copy
findings: Pre-existing typecheck errors (TS6305 - packages not built from source) and backend/app.ts TS7006 are NOT caused by our changes. Same cascading package build issue noted in FEAT-001. Lint passes cleanly. Prettier pre-commit hook auto-formats staged files.
